messages.noPermissionAccount: You do not have permission to access Account Management
messages.noPermissionPayment: You do not have permission to update payment methods
messages.noPermissionCancel: You do not have permission to cancel subscription
messages.noPermissionLicenses: You do not have permission to manage licenses
messages.noPermissionSubscription: You do not have permission to manage the subscription
messages.intervalSwitchAnnual: Billing will switch to annual at the end of the current period.
messages.intervalSwitchMonthly: Billing will switch to monthly at the end of the current period.
messages.trialRequestMessageRequired: Please enter a message describing why you want to try Premium
messages.trialRequestSent: Premium trial request sent! We'll get back to you shortly.
messages.premiumTrialStarted: Premium trial started! You have 30 days to explore Premium features. Your billing stays the same until you confirm.
messages.soloProTrialStarted: Pro trial started! Pro features are unlocked until {{end}} while you stay on Solo billing.
messages.premiumConfirmed: Premium confirmed!{{effective}} You'll stay on Pro pricing until then.
messages.premiumTrialReverted: Premium trial ended. You're back on Pro.
messages.iapUpgradePending: An upgrade is already pending. Cancel it first if you want to start a new one.
messages.iapUpgradeAlreadyPending: You already have an upgrade pending.
messages.iapUpgradeCancelled: Upgrade cancelled. You remain on Apple Solo.
messages.downgradeSuccess: Downgraded to Solo! Refreshing your session...
messages.aiCheckoutFailed: Failed to start AI Assistant checkout
messages.aiRemoved: AI Assistant will be removed from your subscription.
messages.feedbackReasonRequired: Please provide a reason for cancellation
messages.feedbackMaxLength: Feedback must be {{max}} characters or less
messages.feedbackSubmitted: Thank you for your feedback. We have received your cancellation request. You will be logged out shortly.
messages.feedbackSubmitFailed: Failed to submit feedback. Please try again.

features.integrations: Integrations — connect calendar, Teams, Entra, and other external services
features.extensions: Extensions — install and manage marketplace extensions for your workspace
features.managedEmail: Managed Email — configure hosted email delivery from Alga PSA
features.sso: Single Sign-On — configure SSO and OAuth identity providers for your team
features.advancedAssets: Advanced Assets — unlock RMM-linked asset discovery and richer asset controls
features.clientPortalAdmin: Client Portal Admin — manage advanced client portal branding and administration
features.workflowDesigner: Workflow Designer — build and maintain custom workflow automations
features.mobileAccess: Mobile Access — sign in from the Alga PSA mobile app
features.entraSync: Microsoft Entra Sync — auto-discover tenants and sync contacts from Entra ID
features.cipp: CIPP Integration — connect your CIPP instance for multi-tenant Entra management
features.teamsIntegration: Microsoft Teams — meetings integration and Teams bot for ticket notifications
features.advancedAuthorizationBundles: Advanced Authorization Bundles — create and manage premium ABAC narrowing bundles

iapBanner.upgradePendingBody: Apple will continue billing you for Solo until {{date}}. After that, your upgraded subscription will take over automatically.
iapBanner.autoRenewWarningStrong: Auto-renew is currently ON on your Apple subscription
iapBanner.autoRenewWarningBody: please disable it in iOS Settings → Apple ID → Subscriptions → Alga PSA, otherwise Apple will charge you again and the upgrade will be delayed.
iapBanner.appleManagedBody: Your subscription is managed by Apple. Current billing period ends {{date}}. You can upgrade to a larger plan at any time — we'll align the new billing to your Apple period so you never pay for both at once.

paymentFailure.title: Payment Failed
paymentFailure.body: Your last payment was unsuccessful. Please update your payment method to avoid service interruption.

premiumTrial.title: Premium Trial
premiumTrial.premiumConfirmedBody: Premium billing is scheduled to start on {{date}}. You'll continue on Pro pricing until then.
premiumTrial.keepPremiumBody: Your billing has not changed — you're still on Pro pricing. To keep Premium after the trial, you must confirm the switch before {{date}}. If you don't confirm, you'll automatically return to Pro.

soloProTrial.title: Pro Trial
soloProTrial.billingBody: You're still billed on Solo during this trial. Upgrade to paid Pro before {{date}} to keep Pro access after the trial expires.

trialStatus.title: Trial Status
trialStatus.cardChargeBody: Your card will be charged on {{date}}. Cancel anytime before then.

planTier.tierDescription: Your subscription tier determines which features are available
planTier.soloNotice: Your Solo plan includes core PSA features and mobile access. Upgrade to Pro for advanced workflow design, Teams integration, and team collaboration.
planTier.misconfigured: Your plan is not configured correctly. Please contact support.
planTier.emptyFeaturesSolo: Core PSA tools and mobile access are active on Solo. Upgrade to Pro to unlock advanced workflow design and Teams integration.
planTier.emptyFeaturesPro: Your Pro plan includes all standard features.
planTier.proCardDescription: Everything in Solo, plus team collaboration and powerful integrations.
planTier.premiumCardDescription: Everything in Pro, plus enterprise integrations for larger teams.
planTier.tryProFreeBody: Explore Pro features for 30 days while staying on your current Solo billing. When the trial ends, you'll return to Solo unless you upgrade.
planTier.upgradeToPremiumBody: Add Microsoft Entra Sync, CIPP multi-tenant management, and Teams integration.
planTier.downgradeToProBody: Keep multi-user, integrations, and extensions. Lose Entra Sync, CIPP, and Teams.
planTier.downgradeToSoloLimitedBody: Solo is limited to 1 user. You currently have {{count}} active users — remove extra users first.
planTier.downgradeToSoloBody: Switch to the flat-rate single-user plan with core PSA features only.
planTier.downgradeToSoloAltBody: Switch to the flat-rate single-user plan and keep core PSA features.
planTier.downgradeToSoloAltLimitedBody: Solo is limited to 1 user. You currently have {{count}} active users — remove extra users before downgrading.
planTier.tryPremiumSelfServiceBody: Start a 30-day Premium trial to explore advanced features. Your billing stays the same during the trial — no charge until you explicitly confirm the switch.
planTier.tryPremiumRequestBody: Request a 30-day Premium trial to explore advanced features. Your current Pro subscription continues — no interruption.
planTier.requestSent: Request sent! We'll review it shortly.
planTier.requestPlaceholder: Tell us what you'd like to explore with Premium (optional but helps us prioritize)...

aiAssistant.description: AI Assistant is a separate paid add-on for Solo, Pro, and Premium tenants.
aiAssistant.activeBody: AI chat, document assistance, and other AI-powered workflows are currently enabled for this tenant.
aiAssistant.iapUnavailableBody: Add-ons like AI Assistant are not available while your subscription is managed by Apple. To add features beyond the Apple catalog, upgrade to a web-managed plan first.
aiAssistant.addBody: Start a separate AI subscription without changing your core PSA tier.

scheduledChanges.title: Scheduled License Change
scheduledChanges.body: Your license count will change from {{current}} to {{scheduled}} on {{date}}.

primaryActions.needMoreUsersBody: Solo is a single-user plan. Upgrade to Pro to add team members and manage licenses.

dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.body: Canceling your subscription will disable access for all users at the end of the current billing period.

aiCheckoutDialog.title: Add AI Assistant
aiCheckoutDialog.body: Complete your AI Assistant purchase below. This add-on is billed separately from your main tier subscription.

iapAutoRenewDialog.title: Disable auto-renew on your Apple subscription first
iapAutoRenewDialog.body: Your subscription is currently managed by Apple, with auto-renew enabled. To upgrade to {{tier}}, you need to disable auto-renew on the Apple side first so Apple doesn't charge you again after your current period ends.
iapAutoRenewDialog.step1: Open Settings on your iPhone or iPad
iapAutoRenewDialog.step2: Tap your name at the top, then Subscriptions
iapAutoRenewDialog.step4: Tap Cancel Subscription — this disables auto-renew but keeps your access until {{date}}
iapAutoRenewDialog.step5: Return to this page and click Continue below
iapAutoRenewDialog.reassurance: Don't worry — your Solo access continues through the end of your current Apple billing period, and you'll get {{tier}} features immediately after you complete the card setup on the next screen. Your card won't be charged until Apple's billing period ends.

iapCheckoutDialog.title: Upgrade to {{tier}}
iapCheckoutDialog.body: Enter your card details below. Your card will not be charged until your current Apple billing period ends — Stripe will wait until then before starting {{tier}} billing.

cancelIapTransitionDialog.title: Cancel your pending upgrade?
cancelIapTransitionDialog.body1: This will cancel your pending upgrade and return you to Apple-managed Solo. Your card won't be charged, and Apple will continue its normal billing cycle.
cancelIapTransitionDialog.body2: If you want to continue the upgrade later, you can start it again any time.

intervalSwitchDialog.toAnnualIntro: Switch to annual billing and save on your subscription.
intervalSwitchDialog.effectiveNote: This change takes effect at the end of your current billing period

cancelAiDialog.title: Cancel AI Assistant
cancelAiDialog.body1: You are about to cancel the AI Assistant add-on.
cancelAiDialog.body2: AI chat, document assistance, and other add-on-only AI features will be disabled once the add-on is removed from your subscription.

upgradeDialog.title: Upgrade to {{tier}}
upgradeDialog.intro: You are about to upgrade to the {{tier}} plan.
upgradeDialog.prorationNotice: A prorated charge of ${{amount}} will be billed now for the remainder of the current billing period.
upgradeDialog.updateNote: Your existing subscription will be updated and your payment method will be charged. This change takes effect immediately.
upgradeDialog.newSubNote: A new subscription will be created. This change takes effect immediately.

downgradeDialog.title: Downgrade to Solo
downgradeDialog.intro: You are about to downgrade to the Solo plan.
downgradeDialog.footer: Integrations, managed email, workflow design, and mobile access will no longer be available after the downgrade.

premiumTrialDialog.title: Start 30-Day Premium Trial
premiumTrialDialog.intro: You are about to start a 30-day free trial of the Premium plan.
premiumTrialDialog.billingDuringTrialValue: No change — stays at Pro pricing
premiumTrialDialog.afterTrialEndsValue: Reverts to Pro unless you confirm
premiumTrialDialog.infoBox: During the trial you'll have full access to Premium features while continuing to pay your current Pro price. Before the trial ends, you'll see the exact Premium pricing and can choose to confirm the switch. If you don't confirm, you'll automatically go back to Pro — no surprise charges.

soloProTrialDialog.title: Start 30-Day Pro Trial
soloProTrialDialog.intro: You are about to start a 30-day free trial of Pro features.
soloProTrialDialog.billingDuringTrialValue: No change — stays at Solo pricing
soloProTrialDialog.afterTrialEndsValue: Returns to Solo unless you upgrade
soloProTrialDialog.infoBox: Pro-only features unlock immediately. This trial is only available after your initial Solo trial has ended.

confirmPremiumDialog.title: Confirm Switch to Premium
confirmPremiumDialog.intro: You're confirming the switch from Pro to Premium. Here's what you'll be charged going forward:
confirmPremiumDialog.infoBox: Premium billing will start at the end of your current pay period. You'll continue paying your current Pro price until then.

cancellationModal.title: Cancel Subscription
cancellationModal.beforeYouCancelBody: We'd love to hear your feedback to help us improve our service. Your input is valuable to us.
cancellationModal.feedbackPlaceholder: We'd love to hear your feedback so we can improve. Your input helps us serve our customers better.
